item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: Compliance with NITTF, CNSSD 504 Using Workforce Cyber Security vs. User Activity Monitoring
item.description: The National Insider Threat Task Force and Directive 504 requires User Activity Monitoring measures to be in place. See how DTEX can help.

item.title: Insider Threat Advisory:NCSC Issues Updated Guidance for US Critical Infrastructure Entities
item.description: Learn more about the insider threat mitigation guidelines for all US Critical Infrastructure entities that have been issued by the NCSC.

item.title: Key Takeaways from the Gartner® Market Guide for Insider Risk Management
item.description: This blog post looks at the top three takeaways of the 2023 Gartner® Market Guide for Insider Risk Management.

item.title: The Psychology of Insider Risk Management
item.description: Watch episode 2 of Conversations from the Inside with Christopher Burgess and Dr. Deanna Caputo on the psychology of insider risk management

item.title: Insider Risk Management Best Practices | Forrester Report
item.description: Read our key takeaways from Forrester's Best Practices: Insider Risk Management to develop a fully functioning insider risk program.

item.title: Conversations from the Inside: Insider Risk Meets Counterintelligence
item.description: DTEX guest offers insights into detecting, preventing, and investigating adversarial threats within a formalized insider risk program.

item.title: A Communications Framework for Insider Risk Management
item.description: Download the Communications Framework for Insider Risk Management to proactively mitigate insider risk through communications strategies.

item.title: Insider Risk Detection 101: Mitigating Unintentional Insider Threats
item.description: A huge chunk of insider incidents are unintentional. Here are some of the non-malicious behaviors accelerating insider risk.

item.title: Closing the Trust-Risk Loop with File Lineage
item.description: Managing insider risk should not come at the expense of trust. File lineage offers the best of both worlds.

item.title: 7 Reasons to Ditch Endpoint DLP for Endpoint Visibility
item.description: Learn why enterprises are ditching limited, heavy, unfair & complicated network-based endpoint DLP for less painful endpoint visibility

item.title: When it Comes to Insider Risk, the Difference is Human
item.description: When it comes to insider risk management, the difference is human. By 2025, 50% of organizations will have adopted an insider risk program."

item.title: Insider Risk: The Good, the Bad, the Indifferent
item.description: It"s not hard to recognize malicious users. It is, however, more difficult to detect malicious employees when they are operating within expected parameters.

item.title: HR’s Growing Role in Cybersecurity
item.description: Gartner predicts that in the next two years, about 50% of major cybersecurity incidents will be attributed to the human element.

item.title: Massive Tech Layoffs Continue to Increase Insider Risks for Enterprises
item.description: Insider risks will continue to increase alongside layoffs. Learn how DTEX can help protect your organization by preventing data exfiltration.

item.title: From Insight to Action: Five Priorities for Detecting and Deterring Insider Threats
item.description: In his latest blog, DTEX CEO Marshall Heilman lists five critical priorities for detecting and deterring insider threats.

item.title: CrowdStrike Threat Hunting Report Reveals Growing Stealth of Insider Threats
item.description: CrowdStrike's latest Threat Hunting Report reveals the growing stealth of insider threats, and the need for insider risk management.

item.title: DTEX and ServiceNow: A Powerful Integration for Maturing Insider Risk Capability
item.description: The DTEX and ServiceNow integration offers partners a powerful opportunity to elevate their professional services.

item.title: DTEX and GuidePoint Security Expand Insider Risk Partnership
item.description: DTEX and GuidePoint have been selected as the solution providers of choice for some of the world’s most well-known brands.

item.title: Insider Risk Legislation is Coming: Are You Prepared?
item.description: Insider risk legislation is coming. Now is the perfect time to home in on your insider risk capability maturity with an insider risk program.

item.title: When History Repeats | Insider Risk Lessons from the Pentagon Leaks
item.description: The Pentagon leaks should serve as a call to action to redefine insider risk, prioritizing proactive mitigation before the next train bolts.

item.title: DTEX Enables a Privacy-First Approach to Security for a Fortune 500 Workforce
item.description: This Fortune 500 company compared DTEX with Forcepoint and Proofpoint. After a POC, the company chose DTEX for its insider risk management solution.

item.title: DTEX Insider Risk News Digest – Q1, 2023
item.description: The DTEX Insider Risk News Digest for Q1, 2023 is here. Catch up on all the DTEX news and announcements in one place.

item.title: Australia Pushes Pedal on Cyber Infrastructure Resilience
item.description: As the security landscape continues to evolve, now is the time for organizations to revisit their security strategy and the way they address insider risk.

item.title: Global Bank Uplifts Insider Risk Maturity Through Contextual Visibility at Scale
item.description: This case study demonstrates how a global bank leveraged the DTEX Platform to uplift its insider risk maturity capability at scale.

item.title: What is Data Loss Prevention?
item.description: Data Loss Prevention refers to policies, technologies, and controls used by organizations to prevent accidental leaks,

item.title: Global Security Leader Selects DTEX to Manage Insider Risk
item.description: A global security leader has selected DTEX InTERCEPT™ to secure its patents, protect business process innovation, and prevent data loss.

item.title: Australia Raises Bar on Collaboration to Secure Critical Infrastructure
item.description: DTEX has joined up with the A3C, MITRE, Providence Consulting Group, and others to seek practical advice to kick-start Insider Risk programs.

item.title: Why Striking the Balance Between Insider Risk and Privacy is More Important Than Ever
item.description: An insider risk program incorporating privacy is more important than ever in the hybrid work world. Learn more in our research with EMA.

item.title: The Value of HR in Your Insider Risk Management Program
item.description: When it comes to early insider risk detection, the value of HR in your insider risk management program cannot be overstated.
